CustomField.description: Field API names (one per line) whose values are shown as a tooltip when hovering a matrix cell. The first record in the cell is used. Accepts relationship paths (e.g. Country__r.Name).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: One field API name per line. On cell hover, displays each field on its own line as "Field Label: Value", using the first record in the cell.
CustomField.label: On Hover Fields
